title: GTR Class 387(377) Electrostar Megapack [MTR4]
description: Adds every in-service livery carried by the Class 387 EMU with Govia Thameslink Railway (Thameslink, Southern, Great Northern, Gatwick Express) into the world of Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![ex c2c GN Class 387 leaves a station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fde86eba40c2a393f9dac41cf96b11d3e237033_0.webp)

From trundling along the Coastway, to flying through Welwyn at 110, the Class 387 GTR Megapack is here for Minecraft Transit Railway!

Including 12 reskins representing Govia Thameslink Railway's Class 387s, with accurate interior moquettes, correctly-coloured grab rails, external First Class golden lines where appropriate, adjusted internal door buttons, and 2 bonus 377/6 reskins too!

**Gatwick Express:**
- GX Red (Full)
- GX White (Full, 387105's one-off red vinyls)
- GX Plain Red
- GX Small Logo Red

**Southern:**
- Class 377/6 Southern Green
- Class 377/6 Southern Green (Old Logo)
- Class 387/1 White
- Class 387/1 GW Green
- Class 387/3 ex c2c

**Great Northern:**
- Class 387/1 White
- Class 387/1 GW Green
- Class 387/2 GX Plain w/Great Northern Branding
- Class 387/3 ex c2c

**And** the Thameslink 387/1 livery!

![GN-GX Class 387 pauses at a station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc60700c6357065fbb3f894c4e88fde2fc8c76f_0.webp)
